Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit
Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit

Karachi, Pakistan

North Nazimabad, Karachi

Our story

Mazi started as a disagreement with how we were drinking coffee.

Somewhere between the takeaway cup and the laptop, the café stopped being a place to be. It became a transaction. We missed the rooms our parents talked about, the ones where the chair creaked, the fan turned slow, and nobody checked the time.

So we built one. Mazi, a word that means companion, is a small specialty coffee shop in North Nazimabad where the coffee is patient and the conversation is the point. The room is shaped by memory: warm light, worn wood, records on the weekends, and a long table in the middle that anyone can join.

We are not a chain and we are not trying to be. Every cup is pulled by hand, every playlist is chosen, and every regular is known by name. If you are looking for a place to slow down, you have found it.

The room

Set down for slowness

No Wi-Fi on the tables. Phones face-down. The room does the rest.

The experience

What we hold to

  • Patience

    A V60 takes three minutes. We think that is the right amount of time to wait for something good.

  • Craft

    Small-batch roasting, blind tasting, and a barista who knows your order by the second week.

  • Company

    The café exists for the people in it. Come alone, leave with a table.

Mazi

A room for slow mornings and long conversations.
